title: satureja ericifolia subsp. rupestris
intro: Satureja ericifolia subsp. rupestris, also known as Rock savory, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This perennial herb is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been traditionally used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant is valued for its antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Rock savory can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile addition to holistic health practices.
